title: Better CVC Mod
description: Improves the HUD and player experience of Hypixel's Cops and Crims minigame
body:
**THIS MOD DOES NOT PROVIDE THE PLAYER WITH CHEATS OR OTHER METHODS TO MAKE IT EASIER TO WIN THE GAME! ALL THIS MOD DOES IS IMPROVE HOW THE UI/HUD LOOKS DURING A GAME AND VISUAL EFFECTS/IMPROVEMENTS!**

# Moreover, this mod only works with Defusal so far.

What's been added:
- ADS (Aim Down Sights) with a keybind
- Shift to Zoom with scoped guns
- Hidden scoreboard & bossbar
- Money counter with icon
- Team rosters at the top of the screen (player 3d heads and dead markers)
- Objective time at the top center of the screen
- Objective text below timer
- Purchased Armor at the bottom right corner
- Kill Effects! (shown at the top right of the screen)
- Hitmarkers (kinda funky since Hypixel's shooting mechanic is super weird and doesn't follow a regular raycast)
- Team logo animation when the game starts
- Ammo counter in the bottom left corner
- Map and Mode text on the left side of the screen

Plans:
- Gun Game
- Deathmatch
- Banners & In-Game Animations
